dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.heading: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Here's an overview of your transport operations.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.message: We couldn't load your dashboard data. Please try again.

routes.title: Routes
routes.subtitle: Manage your transport routes and stops.

error.title: Failed to load routes
error.message: We couldn't load your routes. Please try again.

empty.title: No routes yet
empty.message: Create your first route to start scheduling trips.

card.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This will also delete all associated stops. Schedules using this route may be affected.

createDialog.title: Create route
createDialog.description: Define a route with at least 2 stops. Stops can be reordered using the arrow buttons.

validation.nameMaxLength: Route name must be at most {{max}} characters.
validation.minStops: A route must have at least 2 stops.
validation.stopNameMaxLength: Stop {{index}} name must be at most {{max}} characters.
validation.stopLatRange: Stop {{index}} latitude must be between -90 and 90.
validation.stopLngRange: Stop {{index}} longitude must be between -180 and 180.

fleet.title: Fleet
fleet.subtitle: Manage your buses and seat configurations.

error.title: Failed to load fleet
error.message: We couldn't load your buses. Please try again.

empty.title: No buses yet
empty.message: Add your first bus to start creating schedules.

card.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete bus "{{plate}}"? Schedules referencing this bus may be affected.

createDialog.title: Add bus
createDialog.description: Add a new bus to your fleet. Choose a template or configure manually.

templateSelector.empty: No templates available. Switch to manual mode.

validation.licensePlateMaxLength: License plate must be at most {{max}} characters.
validation.modelMaxLength: Model must be at most {{max}} characters.
validation.licensePlateConflict: A bus with this license plate already exists.

editDialog.title: Edit seat map
editDialog.description: Click a seat to cycle its type, or select a type from the toolbar to paint seats.
editDialog.loadError: Failed to load bus details. Please close and try again.
editDialog.savedDescription: Seat layout updates will be synced when the API supports it.

schedules.title: Schedules
schedules.subtitle: Manage your trip schedules, assign drivers, and track bookings.

error.title: Failed to load schedules
error.message: We couldn't load your schedules. Please try again.

empty.title: No schedules yet
empty.message: Create your first schedule to start offering trips.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel schedule
cancelDialog.description: Are you sure you want to cancel this schedule for "{{route}}" on {{date}}? This action cannot be undone.

driverDialog.changeDescription: Select a different driver or unassign the current one.
driverDialog.assignDescription: Select a driver to assign to this schedule.

createDialog.title: Create schedule
createDialog.description: Create a new schedule by selecting a route, bus, and setting departure times.
createDialog.stopTimesDescription: Stop times will be auto-calculated by evenly distributing the travel time across the route stops.

validation.arrivalAfterDeparture: Arrival time must be after departure time.
validation.basePriceRange: Base price must be between 0 and {{max}}.
validation.minStops: Selected route must have at least 2 stops.
validation.notFound: Referenced route, bus, or driver not found.

drivers.title: Drivers
drivers.subtitle: Manage your driver accounts and assignments.

error.title: Failed to load drivers
error.message: We couldn't load your drivers. Please try again.

empty.title: No drivers yet
empty.message: Create your first driver account to assign them to schedules.

card.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
card.deleteDescriptionWithSchedules_one: This driver is assigned to {{count}} schedule. They will be unassigned.
card.deleteDescriptionWithSchedules_other: This driver is assigned to {{count}} schedules. They will be unassigned.

createDialog.title: Create driver
createDialog.description: Add a new driver account. The driver will use these credentials to log in.
createDialog.passwordHelper: Must contain at least 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, and 1 digit.

validation.nameMaxLength: Name must be at most {{max}} characters.
validation.emailMaxLength: Email must be at most {{max}} characters.
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.
validation.passwordMaxLength: Password must be at most {{max}} characters.
validation.passwordPattern: Password must contain at least 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, and 1 digit.
validation.phoneMaxLength: Phone must be at most {{max}} characters.
validation.emailConflict: A user with this email address already exists.

error.title: Analytics unavailable
error.message: We couldn't load your analytics data. Please try again.

error.title: Failed to load tracking data
error.message: We couldn't load your fleet tracking data. Please try again.
